settings.heading: CREATE EXCEPTIONAL PRODUCTS WITH QUALITY INGREDIENTS.
settings.text: We're dedicated to quality, sustainability, and positive impact.

settings.heading: Meet Uzma Sharif
settings.text: Uzma is a chocolatier and culinary expert with over 20 years of experience in the food industry. Her passion for chocolate has been a creative obsession that has driven her to create unique and exotic confections that tantalize the taste buds of chocolate lovers everywhere.

settings.title: Where It All Began
settings.text: Uzma was born and raised in the United States, growing up in a single-parent household in Chicago, Illinois. As a first-generation Pakistani American, life was not easy for her family. Despite the challenges, Uzma found solace in her creative side and began channeling her pain into art.

settings.title: Discovering Her Calling
settings.text: At the age of 18, Uzma discovered her talent for cooking and quickly caught the attention of the executive chef in the kitchen where she worked. She skipped college and moved to the Rocky Mountains of Colorado to attend culinary school.

settings.title: Mastering The Art
settings.text: After completing her culinary education, Uzma returned to Chicago to attend the French Pastry School. She studied under world-renowned chefs and learned the art of French pastry.

settings.title: Sharing Her Passion
settings.text: Today, Uzma is a celebrated chocolatier and culinary expert who is thrilled to share her passion for chocolate and her unique cultural perspective with the world.
